programme.desc: After pulling two straight weeks of all nighters before final exams, Adam goes feral.

programme.desc: Adam learns that Jake is nearly blind and convinces him to get glasses.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.desc: Phinneas daydreams of a world where he and the Spiffies are heroic knights sent by King Pixiefrog to rescue Lady Warthog from the evil Jake Dragonmonkey.

programme.desc: A jungle girl, raised by possums, shows up at CDMS, posing a threat to Adam's status as the SHOC - Sole Human On Campus.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4
programme.desc: A letter to the editor makes Jake think that Adam is considering leaving CDMS. In an effort to make Adam feel more welcome, he and his friends set out to become more human.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S4

programme.desc: The competition continues in the Western Region with Exodus Rogers battling Mitch Harrison and Margaux Alvarez taking on Kelly Stone for a shot at Mt. Olympus. programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In these Western division battles we see Robbie Rodriguez go up against Wayne Skivington for the men while Lindsey Hamm takes on Jamara Garrett for the women. They will compete on obstacles such as Nuts & Bolts, Chain Linked, Lunar Impact and Kick Out. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: Down to you
programme.desc: Al and Imogen begin a romantic journey where true love often competes with the temptation to stray from commitment.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits struggling with ordinary problems are pulled through a portal into the Overworld.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: Keanu
programme.desc: Two cousins attempt to infiltrate a street gang to retrieve their purloined pet, only to start a gang war that forces them to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: A Christmas Story Christmas
programme.desc: Sequel to annual holiday favorite, “A Christmas Story.” Ralphie is all grown up and must deal with Christmas and all that comes with it…as a dad.

programme.title: Cart
programme.desc: As a social critique, ‘Cart’ tells a story of the employees of a retail supermarket band together when the contract workers are summarily laid off.

programme.title: Miss Fortune
programme.desc: Swindler Jihye is looking to make her last big score. Together with her daughter, they infiltrate the house of a cultural property broker who has a net worth of 60 billion won.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates South Korea’s largest crime organization and spends eight years rising in the ranks. When the head of the organization is killed, he becomes torn between his loyalties.

programme.title: The Favor
programme.desc: A family’s prayers are answered by a mysterious savior, but as miracles spread, they uncover a chilling truth: every gift comes with a deadly curse.

programme.title: No Other Choice
programme.desc: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a paper mill manager has no other choice but to turn to violence to eliminate those who stand in the way of his dream life.

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Gye-choon and her lost grandaughter Hye-ji reunited after 12 years, yet Hye-ji's strange behaviour raise questions on what happened to her while they were apart.

programme.title: The Whispering
programme.desc: A woman and her boyfriend are among a group of students who are on a trip to celebrate their graduation. They wander into an abandoned amusement park and discover the "House of Horrors".

programme.title: Boy in the Pool
programme.desc: Seok-young bumps into Woo-ju and they get closer after Woo-ju saves her from drowning. They lost touch after Woo-ju moves to Seoul to be a swimmer. Will they be able to meet again?

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A man's obsession with spying on people comes back to hunt him when he begins to stalk a mysterious instagram star.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Dong-hwan wants to uncover the mystery behind his mother's death after her skeletal remains have been discovered. The long-buried memories of her co-workers reveal a hidden truth...

programme.title: The Glorious my Revenge
programme.desc: Detective Ryu lost his beloved son in a hit-and-run accident. As the statute of limitations passed without finding the criminal, he ran into the murderer of his son.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

programme.title: The Ghost Game
programme.desc: 6 students head to a underground reservoir and perform a necromancy ritual but nothing seems to happen. Terror unfolds when the ritual becomes a deadly curse and threatens their lives...

programme.title: I (2021)
programme.desc: Ah-Young who grew up in an orphanage becomes the babysitter of Young-Chae, who is raising a 6-month-old child on her own. One day, her child has an accident and she places all the blame on Ah-Young...

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and friends are going apple picking by the river. It's a hot day, so Ping Pong offers to magic up some fizzy apple drink for them all to drink afterwards. But her spell goes very wrong, sending giant apples rolling down into the river. Just as Rupert is suggesting Ping Pong try again they are all amazed to see Ming float by, surrounded by apply-bubbles. Ping Pong's giant magic apples have turned the river into a fizzy apple juice river, and the bubbles make you float. Soon Rupert and friends are having a great time, sucking in bubbles and floating about. But then Edward notices a problem. The apples are causing a log jam at the bridge and unless they can get them out, the river will flood. How will they get the river back to normal and prevent Nutwood being swept away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Freddy and Freda “borrow” Ping Pong's Magic Book and accidentally say a spell that makes their toy cupboard float off across Nutwood. Rupert takes charge of trying to stop the runaway item of furniture before it does any damage, trying to lasso it. But the Fox Twins meddle again, and Ping Pong gets tangled up in the lasso, ends up floating high in the sky, dangling from the flying cupboard! Things become even more serious when she floats out over the sea and gets stranded on a rock. Rupert has to make the Fox Twins face up to the trouble they've caused, and find a way to undo the magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. But as the night goes on, an exhausted Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang. He ultimately realizes that missing your bedtime isn’t all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When fun-loving, water-dwelling tadpole LALA shows up in Gloria’s tank, the two become underwater besties! But when Molly wants Gloria to spend “Palentine’s Day” with her, Gloria can’t admit she’s already made plans to spend it with her “land” friends and runs herself ragged running back and forth between Molly and the gang. Gloria’s attempts to make everyone happy backfire, leading her to learn that she can have different groups of friends, and it’s okay to play with them one at a time, or all together!

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: Inheritors

Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and friends are going apple picking by the river. It's a hot day, so Ping Pong offers to magic up some fizzy apple drink for them all to drink afterwards. But her spell goes very wrong, sending giant apples rolling down into the river. Just as Rupert is suggesting Ping Pong try again they are all amazed to see Ming float by, surrounded by apply-bubbles. Ping Pong's giant magic apples have turned the river into a fizzy apple juice river, and the bubbles make you float. Soon Rupert and friends are having a great time, sucking in bubbles and floating about. But then Edward notices a problem. The apples are causing a log jam at the bridge and unless they can get them out, the river will flood. How will they get the river back to normal and prevent Nutwood being swept away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Freddy and Freda “borrow” Ping Pong's Magic Book and accidentally say a spell that makes their toy cupboard float off across Nutwood. Rupert takes charge of trying to stop the runaway item of furniture before it does any damage, trying to lasso it. But the Fox Twins meddle again, and Ping Pong gets tangled up in the lasso, ends up floating high in the sky, dangling from the flying cupboard! Things become even more serious when she floats out over the sea and gets stranded on a rock. Rupert has to make the Fox Twins face up to the trouble they've caused, and find a way to undo the magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. But as the night goes on, an exhausted Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang. He ultimately realizes that missing your bedtime isn’t all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When fun-loving, water-dwelling tadpole LALA shows up in Gloria’s tank, the two become underwater besties! But when Molly wants Gloria to spend “Palentine’s Day” with her, Gloria can’t admit she’s already made plans to spend it with her “land” friends and runs herself ragged running back and forth between Molly and the gang. Gloria’s attempts to make everyone happy backfire, leading her to learn that she can have different groups of friends, and it’s okay to play with them one at a time, or all together!

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Oblivion

programme.title: Ring of Fire Part 1

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq 1
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.title: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall 1
programme.desc: Having been fearful of hippos since a young boy, Steve Backshall sets out to discover why hippos are considered the most dangerous animals in Africa, and if their aggressive reputation is misunderstood.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in Sri Lanka 1
programme.desc: The presenter takes a train ride into tea country to find out about Ceylon tea. Xander also meets a master Kandyan dancer to learn about Kandy city's annual procession.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Spice Trail Adventure 1
programme.desc: Joanna Lumley's spice journey continues on the African island of Madagascar. Travelling overland, she discovers the secrets of the world's second most expensive spice, vanilla.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy 1
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples, searches for the best San Marzano tomatoes and continues his culinary journey on the island of Ischia and the Amalfi Coast.

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq 1
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.title: The Last Overland 1
programme.desc: Alex and Nat meet a new guide, Sithu. Heading north, the team are trying to follow Tim's old road to India's notorious "Wild West", but Sithu warns of an escalating civil war on the road ahead.

programme.desc: Joanna Lumley's spice journey continues on the African island of Madagascar. Travelling overland, she discovers the secrets of the world's second most expensive spice, vanilla.

programme.desc: Alex and Nat meet a new guide, Sithu. Heading north, the team are trying to follow Tim's old road to India's notorious "Wild West", but Sithu warns of an escalating civil war on the road ahead.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she’s ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards’ former family home. She’s determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards’ former family home. She’s determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she’s ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards’ former family home. She’s determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Fong Sai-Yuk, Return of Heroes
programme.desc: After Fong Sai-Yuk’s adoptive father is murdered by traitors of the Red Flower Society, he vows to hunt them down and avenge his death. Driven by grief and loyalty, he rises against the conspirators in a ruthless fight for justice.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Rute:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah brings a Filipino classic to life with her adobo baby back ribs and pancit noodles, each with a Southern twist and inspired by a chef in Atlanta. She marinates the ribs and pan-fries them.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: After the intense first audition, the actors unwind with a friendly table-tennis match. But the celebration is short-lived as a new mission arrives. This time, there’s a twist: a female scene partner.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: John is a sweet guy trying to get over his bumpy past, but not as bumpy as the huge growth on his shoulder. Tami has yellow deposits on her eyelids that make it impossible for her to feel beautiful.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: This is the story of 15-year-old Erica who vanished without a trace. Authorities believed Erica may have been the victim of a local serial killer, but her mother, Carrie refused to believe the worst.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: The second romance mission challenges the actors to reinterpret legendary performances by Eric (Another Miss Oh) and Son Suk-ku (My Liberation Notes), bringing their own unique perspectives to the scripts.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Frankie leaves foster care to attend an exclusive Swiss boarding school. Turns out, the opportunity comes at a deadly price when a classmate is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.title: Living with my Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the man who killed her and allows him to work on her property, only to find that what's past is not always past.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is joined by husband John, as she shows how to prepare a chicken and fig dish, featured on their wedding menu. Meanwhile, Rachael's sister Maria makes a one-bowl carrot cake.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is known for her delicious and flavourful pesto sauces of all varieties. She prepares a pesto alla trapanese, a Sicilian dish made with almonds and tomatoes.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The home chefs face their first team challenge when they’re tasked with pairing up with another region and grilling a delicious meal for 101 firefighters and emergency personnel.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The top 17 chefs return for the second Mystery Box Challenge - with a twist: one region will begin the challenge 10 minutes behind the rest. With one box per region, chefs must race against time.

programme.title: Cycle around Japan
programme.desc: We ride in Ibaraki and Tochigi, looking for the bounties of spring. We meet a farming couple growing sweet bell peppers and a motorcycle shop owner who restored a beloved classic model.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Bosai: Science that Can Save Your
programme.desc: Robots are garnering attention for their potential in disaster areas. We'll look at the cutting-edge initiatives aimed at further advancing the application of disaster response robots.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Miyamae Yoshiyuki (Fashion designer) visits Kochi. Kochi's Sunday market features around 500 stalls with fixed locations. Miyamae contemplates how communication has contributed to its longevity.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: From the colorful pleasure quarters of Gion to tense drama in a remote villa to the thrilling climax, kabuki actor Kataoka Ainosuke guides us through the second half of "Chushingura."

programme.title: Hiroshima Ground Zero
programme.desc: When the atomic bomb fell on Hiroshima, 78 people who were within 500 meters of the hypocenter survived. We visualize what happened at ground zero that day based on rare recordings of eyewitnesses.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Mt. Fuji: Climb Japan's Magic Peak
programme.desc: Climb Japan's tallest mountain on a quiet, scenic route with the right gear,stay overnight in a traditional mountain hut, pass the mid-mountain crater, and head toward the thrilling summit!

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: Meet a fish that's all mouth ... but incredibly tough too! The "Alien Fish" is only 20cm long, but skillfully uses its large mouth to intimidate all comers, even divers, to protect its humble shell.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Iwate Prefecture is home to many historic sites which were made to represent Buddhist paradise. Catch a glimpse of eternity through time-lapse photography.

programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries. Watch out, too, for the delightful illustrations!

programme.title: Lot 1000: The Place and the People
programme.desc: Redevelopment plans mean that the last building in Lot 1000 in central Sapporo must be demolished. We learn about the past, present, and future of this spot, exploring its centuries-long history.

programme.title: Anpan is Joy
programme.desc: A single bite of anpan, bread filled with sweet bean paste, is sheer joy. Born at the end of the samurai era, it has over 150 years of history.

programme.title: Mt.Fuji's Climb to World Heritage
programme.desc: Mt. Fuji's bid for World Heritage faced formidable obstacles, including devastation that would shock any mountain climber. This is the story of Fuji's long climb to celebrated cultural treasure.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: Ultra-thin noodles and amber broth: the story of a people who overcame disaster and their favorite bowl of ramen.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for music from Chameleon Lime Whoopiepie (getting international attention for their free-spirited style) and vocalist Suzuhana Yuko, who fuses rock with traditional Japanese instruments.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-12.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: There are about 900 service areas along Japan's expressways. Some feature aquariums, amusement parks, or hot spring baths. They continue to evolve, fulfilling a growing variety of functions.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Yufuin District is known for hot springs. Meme lives at a temple and loves to sunbathe with the chief priest. Mari likes to relax in baskets or on top of manhole covers. Fuku lives at a sake brewery.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion

programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When three fire emergencies break out across Axle City, it's up to Blaze to put 'em out - and to do it, he'll transform into the most epic fire rescue vehicles we've ever seen!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a dolphin named Flippy needs help getting back to his family in the ocean, there's only one monster machine with enough power to get the job done: Big Rig Blaze!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It’s the annual Mayor’s Race, and Mayor Humdinger is planning his most devious cheating scheme yet. // When Ryder comes across a map for buried treasure, Mayor Humdinger snatches the map and runs off to find the loot for himself.

programme.title: Deer Squad

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a piñata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy take Peppa and George for a day out at the botanical gardens. There is so much to see and learn and Miss Rabbit and Mr Rabbit are there to tell them all about it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at school where they have a special guest, Mr Potato! Mr Potato is there to host a special quiz for the children about fruit and vegetables.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George join Granny Pig and her friends to play at being Vikings. The Vikings are having fun on Grandpa Pig's boat until they realise they've left their picnic behind!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Today at playgroup Peppa and her friends make their own instruments from bits and bobs of old packaging.

programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: It's nighttime in Axle City, and Blaze and AJ stumble upon the race of their dreams: the Great Bedtime Race! But Crusher is also in the race and he won't rest until he wins. Will Blaze come out on top, or will Crusher take home the Nightlight Trophy?

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Justice League (2017)
programme.desc: Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of metahumans to stand against this newly awakened threat. But despite the formation of this unprecedented league of heroes – Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash – it may already be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop goes on a 24-hour training course with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

programme.title: In the Heights
programme.desc: The creator of "Hamilton" and the director of "Crazy Rich Asians" invite you to a cinematic event, where the streets are made of music and little dreams become big... "In The Heights."

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man (Ewan McGregor) living in a futuristic sterile colony begins to question his circumscribed existence when his friend (Scarlett Johansson) is chosen to go to the Island – reportedly the last uncontaminated place on earth.

programme.title: ER S2 17
programme.desc: Resentment grows between Ross and Benton when Benton exposes one of Ross' major medical mistakes. Chloe claims that she's sober, but Lewis keeps her away from Susie.

programme.title: ER S2 18
programme.desc: Greene copes with an understaffed ER on a night shift; a teen overdoses on a toxic chemical; a drive-by shooting injures a baby.

programme.desc: Ross becomes nervous when his new girlfriend, Mona, wants to mail cute Christmas cards.

programme.title: Friends S8 13

programme.desc: Joey takes Rachel to the hospital because of pain relating to her pregnancy.

programme.title: Friends S8 15
programme.desc: Monica playfully prepares a special Valentine's Day for Chandler.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 04
programme.desc: Working at a tattoo parlor, Michael gets some killer ink in a flash. Then it's SNAKES ON A SEDAN when a serpent ambushes a routine car checkup, and down on the docks, one unlucky guy learns a lesson in shrinkage.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 23
programme.desc: Determined to prove that he's just as "black" as his cousin, Carlton accepts Will's challenge to survive for two days in a very tough Los Angeles neighborhood.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 24
programme.desc: Will and Carlton spy on Ashley when she goes on her "first date" with a famous young rap singer named Little T.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 25
programme.desc: To keep her new job as personal assistant to a movie star (Oscar-nominated guest star Queen Latifah - "Chicago"), Hilary has to accept a date with Will's best friend, Jazz.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 5
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that truly stink. Then the punishment takes an unexpected and never before seen twist when the big loser wonders if he's too old to get a visit from the tooth fairy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 6
programme.desc: It's spa day for the Jokers, although for them it's anything but relaxing. Then at the park, Sal reveals his secret identity while discussing the "birds-and-bees" of dolphins. Plus, surprised strangers wish they could have their "penny" back for sharing their thoughts. Finally, the big loser finds himself a little over dressed, and at the last minute has the runway pulled out from under him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 7
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q network their way into some very uncomfortable business conversations, and go head to head in a photography presentation that's anything but picture perfect. Then, the clock is ticking during a time sensitive challenge in the park. And finally, tonight's big loser thinks he can sing and dance his way out of his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 8
programme.desc: The Jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leave everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side when they catchsome dreams down at the shore. And the big loser of the night has his tour dampened by the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 9
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons, and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! And tonight's loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation!

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 8
programme.desc: Sheldon punishes Leonard for a past mistake by making him "walk a mile in his shoes." Meanwhile, Penny confronts Raj's ex-girlfriend, Lucy (guest star KATE MICUCCI).

programme.title: ER S2 17
programme.desc: Resentment grows between Ross and Benton when Benton exposes one of Ross' major medical mistakes. Chloe claims that she's sober, but Lewis keeps her away from Susie.

programme.title: ER S2 18
programme.desc: Greene copes with an understaffed ER on a night shift; a teen overdoses on a toxic chemical; a drive-by shooting injures a baby.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: Behind every great love is a great story. In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple. Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love. Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: Body of Lies
programme.desc: Trust no one. Deceive everyone. When idealistic CIA agent Roger Ferris (Di Caprio -- The Departed, Blood Diamond) is stationed in Jordan after being wounded in Iraq, he dedicates his life to stopping further attacks by Al Qaeda. Following a plan that the British employed successfully against the Nazis, Ferris plants the suspicion among the terrorists that their leaders are collaborating with the Americans. But as the stakes rise and Ferris finds himself in the crosshairs, the plot he starts spirals into an outcome he could never have foreseen.

programme.title: Dinos, Ducks & More Animal Friends!
programme.desc: Baby John meets animal friends! He visits Old MacDonald's farm & makes his own crazy creatures!

programme.title: Let's Play Dress Up with Baby John!
programme.desc: Let's play dress up with Baby John! The family has a disco party & the kids pretend to be police officers!

programme.title: Messy Mayhem in the Clubhouse!
programme.desc: It's messy mayhem in the clubhouse! A slime volcano erupts & a magic mirror makes lots of colorful Bobas!

programme.title: JJ's Animal Friends & Counting!
programme.desc: Count with JJ & animal friends! He finds 5 little ducks, searches for his teddy bear & counts hatching eggs!

programme.title: Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time! She gets a new kitten, dances in her ballerina tutu & hosts a fun tea party for her friends!

programme.title: Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Kick the winning goal in a big soccer match, then learn the importance of teamwork and trying your best.

programme.title: Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn important lessons! Pogo learns to compromise at a party & Newt learns not to give up!

programme.title: Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Race to the finish line with Cody and friends! Compete in a soccer match and a fast-paced sprint to the end.

programme.title: Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Explore letters, sounds & songs with Ms. Appleberry & JJ. Play pretend & see what's inside the Melon Box.

programme.title: Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn to play together! Jeff & Bubbles share blocks & Fuse learns to be a team player!

programme.title: My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn big lessons! Bubbles becomes Lulu's hero & Fuse is encouraged to eat his healthy greens!

programme.title: When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Baby Daniel is causing mayhem! He finds Arpo's remote control & makes a huge mess all over the kitchen!

programme.title: Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: Arpo has crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! He races Nannybot in a go-kart & dances uncontrollably!

programme.title: Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Train for the big game with Cody! Race on motor trikes, play on the playground, and hike through autumn leaves.

programme.title: Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Score the winning goal in a family soccer game, and then celebrate with a super fast freeze dance party!

programme.title: How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi learns how awesome things work! He explores a firetruck, an F1 race car, a monster truck & a crane!

programme.title: From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi meets amazing animals! He helps a sauropod stuck in mud & meets a corgi who is a real-life knight!

programme.title: Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: Let's get curious & creative! The mysterious Curiosity Crew appears & Blippi learns to mix colors with them!

programme.title: Baby John's Big World Adventure!
programme.desc: Baby John's on a big world adventure! He explores a reptile zoo, visits an insect park & goes to space camp!

programme.title: Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Learn to play soccer with Baby John! Practice your kicks, score a big goal, and see why sharing is caring.

programme.title: Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Kick off a day of sports with a huge soccer game, then play basketball, baseball, and solve a fun mystery!

programme.title: JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ learns to be kind! He uses the magic words, learns to share his toys & helps his family around the house!

programme.title: Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Go for the gold in a super-powered soccer match where the Magic Pets can use their amazing powers to win!

programme.title: Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Orphle & Winston have the worst ideas ever! They multiply Orphle & turn Winston into a rat by mistake!

programme.title: When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Baby Daniel is causing mayhem! He finds Arpo's remote control & makes a huge mess all over the kitchen!

programme.desc: Arpo faces squirrel trouble & other wacky problems, like a ghost in the house & a malfunctioning music mode!

programme.title: When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Buster's dreams come to life! He dreams he's a fish in the sea & blasts off to space as a rocket!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.desc: Win the football championship with Gecko! Fix broken vehicles and teach Weasel that cheaters never win.

programme.title: Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: It's a day of epic rescues & Weasel's fails! Gecko saves a flying monster truck filled with Weasel's helium!

programme.title: JJ's Family Love & Healthy Habits!
programme.desc: It's family love & healthy habits! JJ celebrates his birthday, eats veggies & learns road safety with ducks!

programme.title: Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Score the winning goal in a family soccer game, and then celebrate with a super fast freeze dance party!

programme.title: A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: It's an ocean clean-up day! Super Shark recycles rubbish & the family builds a ball pit from recycled items!

programme.title: Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an underwater learning adventure! The Sharksons sing the ABCs, learn colors & brush their shark teeth!

programme.title: A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of discovery with Twinkle! She makes music with toadstools & plays "Twinkle Says" with her friends!

programme.title: Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Learn gentle lessons with Twinkle! She learns about healthy fruit, animal sounds & sings sleepy songs!

programme.title: Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Challenge your parents to a game of sports! Play soccer, basketball, and baseball with JJ and all his friends.

programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ to meet classroom pets, learn about shapes & explore more letters & Numbers.

programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia learns calming yoga poses & Daddy shows her the "brush your teeth dance"!

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When reliable 22-year-old, Molly Jane Matheson, didn't show up for work, her mother Tracy drove to her Fort Worth, Texas apartment to check on her.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Montie and Sherry find themselves in a dire situation as their daughter, Audora, is contemplating involving adult protection services due to their living conditions.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Montie's recent hospitalisation following a severe work accident prompted Audora to inspect the state of their home. Horrified by what she discovered, Audora is now determined to seek help for her parents.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect. As prosecutors prepare for the trial, key evidence goes missing.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S4)
programme.desc: An argument erupts outside a Florida nightclub. One man is killed, and another is charged with murder. Was it a case of cold-blooded murder, or did he have to shoot to save his own life?

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.

programme.title: Women on Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.
